PostToolUse.command: npx prettier --write "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true; npx eslint --fix "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true

PreToolUse.command: echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '(\.env|\.lock$|pnpm-lock|implementation-plan/)' && echo 'BLOCKED: Cannot edit protected file' && exit 1 || exit 0
